name: Tribute Golf Course
about: Tribute Golf Course, located in Wausau, Wisconsin, is part of a dual-venue facility that includes both an outdoor golf course and an indoor golf simulator. The indoor simulator offers a climate-controlled environment for year-round practice and play. It provides convenient booking through Eagle Club Systems and supports both individual and group sessions. The facility is affiliated with Tribute Golf Course, which features a full-service clubhouse restaurant and is managed by local ownership focused on providing affordable rates and community-friendly golf experiences.
why_golfers_like_it: Indoor golf simulator allows for year-round play and practice, unaffected by weather
Offers competitive pricing with a $2/player discount for online tee time reservations
Convenient booking system with options to save a shortcut on mobile devices for easy access
Supports junior golf programs with free and discounted rates for young players

food_and_drink.notes: On-site full-service bar & restaurant (Bunkers Restaurant) at the clubhouse offering a full menu
Full-service bar available at Bunkers Restaurant in the clubhouse

simulator_hardware.notes: In-house booking and management software; no specific hardware details provided

faq.question: Do I need my own golf clubs to use the simulator?
faq.answer: The website does not specify if club rentals are available; it is recommended to bring your own clubs for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue features Bunkers Restaurant, a full-service bar & restaurant, so outside food and drink policies are not detailed. It is recommended to inquire directly.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: The website does not provide a specific time estimate for completing 18 holes, but booking is done in hourly slots.

faq.question: Is the simulator kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility supports junior golf with free golf for juniors when playing with a paid adult and special events like the 'Fore The Kids Golf Funraiser Event'.
